title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions family as a Frontend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
